title: Supplementaries Knowlogy
description: Knowlogy Book addon with wiki information about the Supplementaries mod.
body:
# Supplementaries Knowlogy
![Globe Entry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48e15c3d2be05dfefcf0e9c8e1e9f70eefc02f61.png)

![Modrinth Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/wySf9XGm?label=Latest%20Version&labelColor=242424&color=1e1e1e)
![Modrinth Minecraft Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/wySf9XGm?label=Minecraft%20Versions&labelColor=242424&color=1e1e1e)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/wySf9XGm?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-knowlogy)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1153905?style=flat&logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/supplementaries-knowlogy)

This is an addon mod for [Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy) that adds [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared) information to the **Book o' Knowlogy**, showing information from the [official Supplementaries Wiki](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/Supplementaries/wiki).

## Features

### Crafting Recipes

![Bomb Entry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wySf9XGm/images/dca113d3739d01ae7f06852d6f13a153aef55716.png)

It teaches you on how to craft and shows what are the other forms to obtain the items added by [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and by [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared).

### Deep Descriptions

![Cannon Entry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wySf9XGm/images/4ae09175c0000d8c04b730ad107e81b96ffe2381.png)

Shows exactly how to use the blocks and items that have unique features.

### Block Links

![Looking at Doormat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wySf9XGm/images/73ba6ce0f1c2a2a964f8c6c9cbe8fda0c6f93846.png)

Easily identify in-world blocks and go straight to learning how it works.

### Visualization

![Safe Entry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wySf9XGm/images/494c86e59e8a299d526f16e8d46ac230feed0381.png)

Has cool images so you can see what that book is talking about.
